caption: Table 12: Compatibility matrix. Scope: Bench = model-level benchmarks, Conv = convergence runs, CI = operator-level test suite.
headers: Notes All model benchmark s and
markdown:
| Feature Mixed-precision bf16 | Status ✓ | Scope Bench+Conv | Notes All model benchmark s and |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  | convergence runs |
| Mixed-precision fp16 | ✓ | CI | Operator tests only; no |
|  |  |  | model-level fp16 runs |
| Gradient checkpointing | ✓ | Bench+Conv | All model benchmark s use |
|  |  |  | gradient checkpointin g |
| ZeRO-2 | ✓ | Conv | All convergence runs use Ze |
| ZeRO-3 | ✓ | CI | Parameter gathering tested; |
|  |  |  | model-level runs |
| FSDP1 | ✓ | CI | summon_full_params path t |
| FSDP2 / DTensor | ✗ | — | Not supported; see §6 |
| torch.compile | ✓ | CI | Graph-break-free whe n p=0 |
|  |  |  | §6 |
| Linear layers | ✓ | Bench+Conv | Primary target; all b enchma |
| Conv1d / Conv2d / Conv3d | ✓ | CI | Correctness tests; no perf |
|  |  |  | benchmarks |
| Embedding layers | ✓ | CI | Formula correction (§ 6); no |
|  |  |  | benchmarks |
